fields.Tools Used: Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive), Meta Ads, Other: GHL, Clarity Flow, Zoom, Stripe, Google Docs, SMS, Claude, Chat GPT, Notebook LM, YT, FB, IG, X, Linked In, Gemini, Shortcut.ai,
fields.Never Say Or Do: It should never make life recommendations by hallucinating or pulling things outside of the information I have fed it, and it should not make biblical interpretations that I don't first approve.
fields.Pain Points: Reports and analytics take too long, Legal documents and contracts, Google Ads / paid marketing, Website updates and landing pages, Scheduling and calendar management, Content writing and communications, CRM / customer follow-up, Other: Effectively managing leads, customers, and clients, and making sure that there is a return on ad spend on all paid advertising, and that we can track from first touch to total lifetime value of a customer. We can be able to sort them by recency, frequency, and monetary value, and overlay 80/20 on it.
fields.Anything Else: I'm not sure what my telegram user is
fields.One Thing Change Week: If I never had to log in to another piece of software
fields.Business Description: The worst thing that can happen to a man is to win the wrong game. I help men find - and win - the game they were MADE for
